title: The Horde Mod
description: Adds Horde Beacons which are a new late game combat challenge.
body:
The Horde Beacon is a new challenge in the mid to late game. They take a wide array of resources to craft but the loot they provide is on par with the challenge the horde poses. Your horde loot is affected by the number of players participating and how many times the participants die.
The Horde is finished, but there are future updated planned later down the line.

Notes: Balanced around multiplayer servers. The Horde is still doable solo with vanilla gear.

For issues/questions please contact me on discord: @raggy532
